summary: Comprehensive testing of 3-column WYSIWYG document editor layout for Graupner Suite. All requested features working correctly on desktop: Left sidebar with Services/Articles tabs, search filtering, click-to-add functionality; Center document editor with drag-drop zone; Right sidebar with Kalkulation panel showing Erlöse, cost price inputs, margin calculation, and Übersicht. Mobile layout unchanged - sidebars hidden, dropdowns visible.

design_issues.issue: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - cosmetic React hydration warning in mobile service/article dropdowns, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Desktop 3-column layout visible on quote edit (1920x1080)
Desktop 3-column layout visible on order edit
Desktop 3-column layout visible on invoice edit
Left sidebar: Search input present and functional
Left sidebar: Leistungen tab shows count (3 services)
Left sidebar: Artikel tab shows count (2 articles)
Left sidebar: Tab switching works (Services <-> Articles)
Left sidebar: Search filters items correctly ('Tür' filters 3 items to 2)
Left sidebar: Clicking item adds position to document
Left sidebar: Toast notification shown when item added
Left sidebar: Items are draggable (draggable='true' attribute present)
Center: Document drop zone present (data-testid='document-drop-zone')
Center: Customer select works
Center: Position editing works (description, quantity, unit, price)
Center: Notes textarea works
Right sidebar: Kalkulation toggle present and functional
Right sidebar: Erlöse section shows Netto, MwSt (19%), Brutto
Right sidebar: Cost price inputs present per position (data-testid='cost-price-0')
Right sidebar: Margin calculation appears when cost entered (Erlöse, Kosten, Marge, Marge %)
Right sidebar: Übersicht shows position count and Brutto total
Right sidebar: Übersicht shows customer name
Status dropdown works on desktop (changed Entwurf to Gesendet)
Save button works - redirects to list page with success toast
Mobile layout (390x844): Left sidebar HIDDEN
Mobile layout: Kalkulation panel HIDDEN
Mobile layout: Mobile dropdowns (+ Leistung, + Artikel) VISIBLE
Mobile layout: Status dropdown VISIBLE
Mobile layout: Card-based position layout preserved
critical_code_review_comments: 3-column layout properly implemented using Tailwind CSS grid: lg:grid lg:grid-cols-[260px_1fr_280px]
Responsive breakpoint correctly set at 'lg' (1024px) - sidebars hidden below this
Drag and drop implemented using HTML5 native API (draggable='true', onDragStart, onDragOver, onDrop)
Kalkulation margin calculation logic is correct: margin = revenue - costs, marginPercent = (margin/revenue)*100
Cost prices stored in local state (costPrices) - not persisted to backend (by design for internal calculation)
Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in mobile dropdowns - cosmetic issue
seed_data_creation: Modified quote A-2026-0006 status from Entwurf to Gesendet during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-column WYSIWYG editor layout fully tested and working. Key features: Left sidebar (Services/Articles with search, click-to-add, drag-drop), Center (document editor with drop zone), Right sidebar (Kalkulation with cost inputs and margin calculation). Desktop breakpoint is 'lg' (1024px). Mobile layout unchanged - uses dropdowns instead of sidebars. All document types (quote/order/invoice) have the 3-column layout. Voice/AI features not tested (require OpenAI API key).
